common.builtWith: Built with Next.js, GoldRush, and wagmi

home.headline: Your
home.subtitle: Connect your wallet to generate a shareable identity card showcasing your on-chain presence — NFTs, tokens, and activity.
home.featureNFTDesc: Display your curated NFT collection in a beautiful grid.
home.featureTokenDesc: Show your token holdings with real-time valuations.
home.featureDomainDesc: Link your own domain for a truly sovereign identity.

errors.INVALID_DOMAIN_FORMAT: Invalid domain format. Please enter a valid domain like card.example.com
errors.USER_NOT_FOUND: User not found. Please visit your profile page first.
errors.PRO_REQUIRED: Custom domains require a Pro subscription
errors.DOMAIN_LIMIT_REACHED: Domain limit reached. Pro users can add up to 3 domains.
errors.DOMAIN_ALREADY_TAKEN: This domain is already in use by another account
errors.VERCEL_CONFIG_ERROR: Server configuration error. Please try again later.
errors.VERCEL_REJECTED: Domain registration failed. Please check the domain and try again.
errors.VERCEL_UNREACHABLE: Unable to connect to domain service. Please try again later.
errors.DOMAIN_NOT_OWNED: This domain does not belong to your account
errors.DNS_NOT_CONFIGURED: DNS not configured yet. Please set up the required records below.
errors.ALREADY_PRO: You are already a Pro user!
errors.CHECKOUT_FAILED: Failed to start checkout. Please try again.
errors.INTERNAL_ERROR: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
errors.UNKNOWN_ERROR: Something went wrong. Please try again.

settings.title: Settings
settings.connectPrompt: Connect your wallet to access settings
settings.domainsProOnly: Custom domains are available for Pro users.
settings.verifySuccess: ✅ Domain verified! Your custom domain is now active.
settings.verifyFailed: DNS not configured yet. Please check the records below.
settings.domainAdded: Domain added! Configure the DNS records below.
settings.dnsInstructions: Add these DNS records in your domain provider's dashboard:
settings.clickToCopy: 💡 Click on Name or Value to copy to clipboard
settings.cnameHintNew: After adding a domain, click "DNS Records" to see the exact records you need to configure.
settings.cnameHint: Add a CNAME record pointing to
settings.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {domain}? This will remove the domain from your account and Vercel.
settings.upgradeSuccessDesc: Your payment was successful. Custom domains are now unlocked.
